### Applicable Overlay

**Primary**: `PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL` — PRE_BUILD_GATES overlay (OVL-PBG-001 through OVL-PBG-017)
**Secondary**: `PRODUCT_BUILD_ASSURANCE` — PRODUCT_BUILD_ASSURANCE_STANDARD.md applies at final assurance
**ECAP overlay**: NOT applicable — `ceremony_admin_appointed: TBD`; no protected paths in scope

**Classification rationale**:
- PR modifies `modules/isms/00-app-description/` (Stage 1 artifact) → PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL mandatory
- PR modifies `modules/isms/05-qa-to-red/`, `06-pbfag/`, `08-builder-checklist/`, `09-iaa-pre-brief/` (stages 6–10 artifacts) → PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL mandatory
- PR modifies `modules/isms/prebuild-harvest-package/` (module lifecycle stage artifacts) → PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL mandatory
- PR will deliver `apps/isms-portal/src/pages/*.tsx` (product-facing React pages, T2 UI delivery) → PRODUCT_BUILD_ASSURANCE mandatory at final assurance
- No `.github/agents/`, `.github/workflows/`, `governance/canon/`, `CANON_INVENTORY.json` changes → AGENT_CONTRACT, CI_WORKFLOW, CANON_GOVERNANCE NOT triggered
- No protected paths → ECAP ACR-01–16 checks NOT applicable

**Ambiguity resolution**: CLEAR — dual trigger categories confirmed; no unresolvable ambiguity.

### PREHANDOVER Proof Structure (Required at Final Assurance)

The PREHANDOVER proof for final assurance (T-13) MUST include:

```
## Required PREHANDOVER Fields

session_id: session-isms-public-landing-harvest-20260514
wave: isms-public-landing-harvest
branch: copilot/harvest-legacy-isms-pages
pr_number: 1646
issue: 1645
files_changed: 40  ← must match actual diff count
iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-NNN-isms-public-landing-harvest-20260514-PASS  ← expected-reference format
final_state: COMPLETE  ← only when all gates GREEN
merge_gate_parity: PASS  ← only when CI confirmed GREEN
gate_set_checked: [CI, TypeScript, Tests, Public Route Accessibility, PBFAG compliance, Build integrity]
```

**IAA will verify at final assurance**:
1. `files_changed` count matches actual PR diff
2. All declared route boundary decisions (public/no ProtectedRoute) are implemented in code
3. Zero ProtectedRoute wrapper on any `/marketing/*`, `/free-assessment`, `/journey`, `/modules`, `/subscribe` routes
4. QA-R-001 through QA-R-033 tests are GREEN
5. Existing `scoring.test.ts` and `gap-priority.test.ts` remain GREEN (anti-regression)
6. ISMS app description §16 present and correct in `modules/isms/00-app-description/ISMS_app_description.md`
7. All 9 pre-build harvest package artifacts committed and substantively complete
8. BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md updated to reflect stage completion (Stages 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 gate-passed)
9. IAA wave record TOKEN section populated with PHASE_B_BLOCKING_TOKEN
10. Stale lineage anti-regression: all artifact SHA/path claims match HEAD (session-1278 obligation)
